Description: Summon forth your genie of the lamp. Not the actual being of legend so cannot grant wishes─unless your wish is to be carried somewhere.
DescriptionEnhanced: In the region of Corvos, there exists a legend of a lamp-dwelling spirit that grants wishes to its master. As this particular entity is an imitation later brought forth by a sorcerer, it is far from the omnipotent being described in tales, but in accordance with its creator's design, it will dutifully carry you wherever you wish to go.
Tooltip:
What child wouldn't have
wanted a friend like that?
   - Beruru

Description: Call into battle your Hardy-Daytona, a lore-bending battlebike that will have you feeling as though you were playing a minigame.
DescriptionEnhanced: Designed for battle, the Hardy-Daytona is propelled by a V-type double overhead camshaft engine that produces so much power, it is regarded as a monster of a machine that chooses its rider. Rumor holds it was developed by the weapons division of a mega-corporation, but the truth of its origin cannot be verified.
Tooltip:
Try catching us now, ya bastards!
   - Burly Man

Description: Summon forth your royal magicked carpet, and set forth to see the world shining, shimmering, splendid.
DescriptionEnhanced: According to Corvosi legend, there once lived a king who had a pari for a lover. At the monarch's behest, she wove an array of flying carpets, but his promiscuity led her to set fire to her handiworks in anger. This example was the only one to survive the blaze...or so certain peddlers might claim.
Tooltip:
They have carpets.
*Flying* carpets!
   - G'raha Tia
